    • createPartition

      private OperationTree createPartition(IInternalElement root, String identifier, String[] elements)
      create an axiom which define an enumerated set. the axiom is "partition(Set, {element1},..., {elementN})
      Parameters:
      identifier - identifier of the enumerated set
      elements - elements in the set

    • createElementsOfEnumeratedSet

      private OperationTree createElementsOfEnumeratedSet(IInternalElement root, String[] elements)
      return a command which create a constant for each element in elements

    • createVariable

      public OperationTree createVariable(IMachineRoot root, String varName, Collection<Triplet<String,String,Boolean>> invariant, String actName, String actSub)
      Returns a command that creates a new variable with the given invariants and initialization.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of the machine where the variable is created
      varName - the name of the created variable
      invariant - a collection of invariants, possibly empty if no invariants are desired
      actName - the initialization action label, or null if no initialization is desired
      actSub - the initialization assignment predicate , or null if no initialization is desired
      Returns:
      a command that creates a new variable

    • createInitialisation

      private OperationTree createInitialisation(IMachineRoot root, String actName, String actSub)

    • createInvariantList

      private OperationNode createInvariantList(IMachineRoot root, Collection<Triplet<String,String,Boolean>> invariants)
      Return an Operation to create a list of invariants.

      The theorem attribute is implicitly false.

      label - if null the label of created element is the next free label.

      private OperationCreateElement createParameter(IMachineRoot root, String identifier)

    • createParameter

      private OperationNode createParameter(IMachineRoot root, String[] varIdentifiers)

    • createDefaultElement

      public <T extends IInternalElement> CreateElementGeneric<T> createDefaultElement(IInternalElement parent, IInternalElementType<T> type, IInternalElement sibling)
      return an Operation to create an Element with default name and label
      Parameters:
      parent - the element where the new element is inserted
      type - the type of the new element
      sibling - the new element is inserted before sibling. If sibling is null, the new element is inserted after the last element in parent.

    • getCommandCreateElement

      private OperationTree getCommandCreateElement(IInternalElement element)
      return a Command to create the element in parameter. if the element is delete, the Command create an identical element
      Parameters:
      element - an existing element
      Returns:
      a Command to create element

    • getCommandCreateChildren

      private OperationTree getCommandCreateChildren(IRodinElement[] children) throws RodinDBException

      RodinDBException
